Source   Edit  

Imports

stringresize, asyncwrapper

Types

AsyncArtery = object
  buffer*: string
  bufferConsumer*: proc (x: openArray[char]): Future[int] {.async.} ## returns number of characters consumed
                                                                    ## assumed that something is wrong if 0 characters consumed
  freeBefore*: int
Source   Edit  

Procs

    tags: [], forbids: [].}
returns removed characters from start of buffer Source   Edit
